name: IV Drip & Infusion Therapy
shortDescription: Revitalizing IV drip therapy for hydration, vitamin infusions, hangover recovery, and immune support.
fullDescription: Our IV Drip & Infusion Therapy service delivers essential fluids, vitamins, minerals, and medications directly into the bloodstream for fast and effective results. Whether you need rapid rehydration after a long day on the beach, vitamin boosts for energy and immunity, recovery from illness, or treatment for dehydration and electrolyte imbalance, our IV therapy packages are tailored to your needs.
features: Anti-nausea and pain relief via IV
